title: OpenPRD Product Requirements Document
description: The front-matter manifest of an OpenPRD document. OpenPRD is a lightweight, DIP-style proposal standard: a repo publishes a numbered collection of PRDs under prd/ (prd/NNNN-slug.md), with a 0000-template.md and a README index, committed to the repo like a BIP/EIP/DIP process. This schema governs the YAML front-matter; the body is Markdown with a fixed set of sections. Optional keys MAY be present but empty (null) — the template ships them blank for authors to fill.

openprd.description: OpenPRD standard version this document conforms to, e.g. '0.2'.

id.description: Four-digit zero-padded number, monotonically increasing with no gaps. Matches the filename prefix: prd/<id>-<slug>.md.

title.description: Short imperative title — start with a verb where possible.

status.description: Lifecycle stage. Draft → Review → Accepted → Final; or Rejected/Withdrawn/Superseded.

authors.description: Author identities — email, handle, or DID.

owner.description: Optional DID or handle of the accountable owner (e.g. a LogicSRC account/agent DID).

repo.description: Optional owner/name of the repository this PRD targets.

created.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the PRD was created.

updated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last substantive edit.

discussion.description: Optional URL to the PR/issue/thread where this PRD is discussed.

implementation.description: Optional URL/reference to the implementation PR or tracking issue.

tags.description: Optional freeform labels for grouping PRDs.

supersedes.description: Optional id of an earlier PRD this one replaces.

superseded-by.description: Optional id of a later PRD that replaces this one.
